Struct.name: pcie_prod_cfg_t
Struct.help: Available knobs to configure the RPSS in prod FW

Member.name: pcie_ss_en
Member.help: Set to false to force disable the pciess block

Member.name: pcie_bifurcation_mode
Member.help: Bifurcation Mode config for PCIeSS

Member.name: pcie_clock_mode
Member.help: Link Clock Mode config for PCIeSS

Member.name: pcie_stagger_time
Member.help: Lane Stagger Time config for PCIeSS

Member.name: pcie_aspm_support
Member.help: Feature support mode for PCIe ASPM

Member.name: pcie_ltr_support
Member.help: LTR Support for PCIeSS

Member.name: pcie_l1_exit_latency
Member.help: L1 Exit Latency for PCIeSS

Member.name: pcie_l0s_exit_latency
Member.help: L0s Exit Latency for PCIeSS

Member.name: pcie_loopback_mode
Member.help: Loopback operation mode for PCIeSS

Member.name: pcie_cap_gen_speed
Member.help: Maximum supported PCIe Gen speed for PCIeSS

Member.name: pcie_cap_mps
Member.help: Maximum supported Payload Size (MPS) for PCIeSS

Member.name: pcie_rcb_mode
Member.help: Read Completion Boundary (RCB) config for PCIeSS

Member.name: pcie_ras_mode
Member.help: RAS Operation Mode for PCIeSS

Member.name: pcie_fast_link_mode
Member.help: Enable fast-link-mode for PCIeSS

Member.name: pcie_gen3_eq_disable
Member.help: Disable Gen3 Equalization Phase for PCIeSS

Member.name: pcie_gen4_eq_disable
Member.help: Disable Gen4 Equalization Phase for PCIeSS

Member.name: pcie_gen5_eq_disable
Member.help: Disable Gen5 Equalization Phase for PCIeSS

Member.name: pcie_eq_bypass_support
Member.help: Equalization Bypass Support for PCIeSS

Member.name: pcie_no_eq_support
Member.help: No-Equalization Support for PCIeSS

Member.name: pcie_cxl_sync_header_bypass
Member.help: Sync header bypass for CXL Flex Bus

Member.name: pcie_ide_support
Member.help: IDE Support for PCIeSS

Member.name: pcie_tee_support
Member.help: TEE Support for PCIeSS. Setting this will implicitly set 'pcie_ide_support'

Member.name: pcie_fips_test
Member.help: When TEE Support is enabled, this knob controls the behavior of FIPS testing.

Member.name: pcie_ide_rekey_support
Member.help: IDE Rekeying Support for PCIeSS

Member.name: pcie_ide_sync_msg_threshold
Member.help: IDE Sync Message Threshold for PCIeSS

Member.name: pcie_msi_ext_data_support
Member.help: MSI Extended Data Support for PCIeSS

Member.name: pcie_msi_64bit_support
Member.help: 64-bit MSI Address Support for PCIeSS

Member.name: pcie_system_counter_delay
Member.help: System counter delay for various RPSS instances

Member.name: pcie_aer_ecrc_gen_support
Member.help: AER ECRC Generation Support for PCIeSS

Member.name: pcie_aer_ecrc_check_support
Member.help: AER ECRC Check Support for PCIeSS

Member.name: pcie_aer_multiple_header_support
Member.help: AER Muliple-Header Support for PCIeSS

Knob.name: pcie_configuration_mirroring
Knob.help: Set to true to mirror RPSS configurations on dual SoC boards

Knob.name: die1_rpss_enabled
Knob.help: Set to false to disable die1 RPSS instances

Knob.name: pcie_rpss0_rp0_cfg
Knob.default: {true, 0, false, 0, false, true, false, false, false, 251, false, PCIE_FIPS_NO_TEST, PCIE_RAS_MODE_EN, true, true, true, PCIE_L1_SUPPORT, PCIE_L0S_ENTRANCE_LATENCY_4_US, PCIE_L1_ENTRANCE_LATENCY_8_US, PCIE_L1_LATENCY_32_TO_64_US, PCIE_L0S_LATENCY_2_TO_4_US, true, PCIE_CLOCK_SRIS, PCIE_STAGGER_NONE, PCIE_LOOPBACK_NONE, PCIE_GEN_1, PCIE_MAX_1024B_SIZE, PCIE_RP_RCB_64B, false, false, false, false, false, false, true, true, PCIE_MSI_REQ_1_VECTOR}

Knob.name: pcie_rpss0_rp1_cfg
Knob.default: {true, 1, false, 0, false, true, false, false, false, 251, false, PCIE_FIPS_NO_TEST, PCIE_RAS_MODE_EN, true, true, true, PCIE_L1_SUPPORT, PCIE_L0S_ENTRANCE_LATENCY_4_US, PCIE_L1_ENTRANCE_LATENCY_8_US, PCIE_L1_LATENCY_32_TO_64_US, PCIE_L0S_LATENCY_2_TO_4_US, true, PCIE_CLOCK_SRIS, PCIE_STAGGER_NONE, PCIE_LOOPBACK_NONE, PCIE_GEN_1, PCIE_MAX_1024B_SIZE, PCIE_RP_RCB_64B, false, false, false, false, false, false, true, true, PCIE_MSI_REQ_1_VECTOR}

Knob.name: pcie_rpss0_rp2_cfg
Knob.default: {true, 2, false, 0, false, true, false, false, false, 251, false, PCIE_FIPS_NO_TEST, PCIE_RAS_MODE_EN, true, true, true, PCIE_L1_SUPPORT, PCIE_L0S_ENTRANCE_LATENCY_4_US, PCIE_L1_ENTRANCE_LATENCY_8_US, PCIE_L1_LATENCY_32_TO_64_US, PCIE_L0S_LATENCY_2_TO_4_US, true, PCIE_CLOCK_SRIS, PCIE_STAGGER_NONE, PCIE_LOOPBACK_NONE, PCIE_GEN_1, PCIE_MAX_1024B_SIZE, PCIE_RP_RCB_64B, false, false, false, false, false, false, true, true, PCIE_MSI_REQ_1_VECTOR}

Knob.name: pcie_rpss0_rp3_cfg
Knob.default: {true, 3, false, 0, false, true, false, false, false, 251, false, PCIE_FIPS_NO_TEST, PCIE_RAS_MODE_EN, true, true, true, PCIE_L1_SUPPORT, PCIE_L0S_ENTRANCE_LATENCY_4_US, PCIE_L1_ENTRANCE_LATENCY_8_US, PCIE_L1_LATENCY_32_TO_64_US, PCIE_L0S_LATENCY_2_TO_4_US, true, PCIE_CLOCK_SRIS, PCIE_STAGGER_NONE, PCIE_LOOPBACK_NONE, PCIE_GEN_1, PCIE_MAX_1024B_SIZE, PCIE_RP_RCB_64B, false, false, false, false, false, false, true, true, PCIE_MSI_REQ_1_VECTOR}

Knob.default: {true, 4, false, 0, false, true, false, false, false, 251, false, PCIE_FIPS_NO_TEST, PCIE_RAS_MODE_EN, true, true, true, PCIE_L1_SUPPORT, PCIE_L0S_ENTRANCE_LATENCY_4_US, PCIE_L1_ENTRANCE_LATENCY_8_US, PCIE_L1_LATENCY_32_TO_64_US, PCIE_L0S_LATENCY_2_TO_4_US, true, PCIE_CLOCK_SRIS, PCIE_STAGGER_NONE, PCIE_LOOPBACK_NONE, PCIE_GEN_1, PCIE_MAX_1024B_SIZE, PCIE_RP_RCB_64B, false, false, false, false, false, false, true, true, PCIE_MSI_REQ_1_VECTOR}
